task_md:
You are a data engineer validating a nightly export.

`/data/numbers.txt` contains one integer per line. Write `/output/stats.txt` containing exactly two lines and nothing else:

```
sum=<S>
max=<M>
```

where `<S>` is the sum of all the integers and `<M>` is the largest, each with a trailing newline.
dockerfile:
FROM python:3.11-slim
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir pytest
COPY numbers.txt /data/numbers.txt
RUN mkdir -p /output
WORKDIR /app

tests.test_stats.py:
from pathlib import Path


def test_stats_exact_content():
    p = Path('/output/stats.txt')
    assert p.exists(), 'solution did not write /output/stats.txt'
    assert p.read_text() == 'sum=25\nmax=10\n'

solution_md:
Reference solution (runnable — Gate B' executes this):

```bash
awk 'NR==1{m=$1} {s+=$1; if($1>m)m=$1} END{printf "sum=%d\nmax=%d\n", s, m}' /data/numbers.txt > /output/stats.txt
```
